questionHtml:
The diagram shows water molecules.

 

Which property of water is not illustrated?

A.  Cohesion

B.  Dipolarity

C.  Hydrogen bonding

D.  Adhesion

meta.title: The diagram shows water molecules. Which property of water is not illustrated? A. Cohesion B. Dipolarity C. Hydrogen bonding D. Adhesion
breadcrumbLabels: A1.1.2. Hydrogen bonds as a consequence of the polar covalent bonds within water molecules
